meaning: n.矿渣,炉渣,火山岩渣v.起溶渣,成溶渣
examples: At last, the slag (残渣) from burning masks can be recycled to make bricks (砖块) or fill the roads.
The ethnic slag aside, he was right.
The cost, too, fell, because slag is free, whereas clay costs money.
Indium is leached from slag and dust of zinc production and the metal further purified by electrolysis.
Professor Sisson determined that the steel was attacked by a liquid slag which contained iron, sulphur and oxygen.
